name: Outro
_source: s;Gabrielle;ALRIGHT!!!{c:wait;100} You won, I'll tell you what I know about whats going on here.

s;Emma;Talk smartly now,|I will burn you to a crisp right were you stand if you try to run or cast a spell.|Ok first question why are you guys here in Rosefall to begin with?{w} Why did you guys teaming up with wrisiam?

s;Gabrielle;We were send to kill the princess of the kistunes, we captured her not long ago.{w} She's been taken to a fort up that mountain. And why we teamed up with Wrisiam...{w} It's becau--{c:wait;500} GAHHHH!!!
s;Emma;What was that? He just died right in front of me!{w} Layla can you sense anything that happened to him?

s;Layla;Hmmm{tgm}...{tgm} I sense some kind of magic seal that was on him.{w} I guessed it triggered when he value to umbra is no more{w} or maybe to stop him from talking.{w} Look I see the magic seal on his heart.
s;Emma;He mentioned that the kistune princess is up on that mountain outpost.{w} If we move now we can make it before the noon.
s;Sarah;I heard from the townsfolk that they have alot of their soldiers guarding that outpost.{w} The princess is going to be executed later this night!{w} So we need to move before it happened.
s;Emma;Maybe we can learn something from the princess on what is happening to rosefall.|Mostly{tgm}...{tgm} Why did they team up with wrisiam to beginning with.
s;Layla;I can see what I can learn from this seal. This could give us a clue on what could{w} trigger it and we can stop it from happening or even better to stop it in general.
s;Emma;Alright, I can't believe I am saying this but bring the corpse with us.{w} Burn it if it starts to reanimate or something.|{tgm}(This is maybe the worst decision I ever made.){tgm}
s;Emma;Defiants!!{c:wait;100} LETS MOVE OUT!!!!{c:wait;100} We've got a princess to save.
